headlines.title: Cruz’ing through the terminal: A&K Robotics lands $8M for autonomous mobility
headlines.summary: Investment is led by Business Development Bank of Canada’s Industrial Innovation Venture Fund and Vantage Futures to expand production and R&D capacity.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle autonomous, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Accenture, Vodafone, and SAP to pilot humanoid robots in the warehouse
headlines.summary: The humanoids in the pilot are powered by Accenture’s Robot Brain solution, enabling them to interact naturally with human operators.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle humanoid, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard face new suit over card fees
headlines.summary: Three plaintiffs say a 2019 settlement in card fee litigation should not give the card networks years of legal immunity for antitrust claims.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: From sci-fi to reality: Physical AI’s future with Dr. Jan Liphardt
headlines.summary: Dr. Jan Liphardt discusses the impact of modular AI systems on robotics, emphasizing the importance of transparency and safety in human-robot interactions.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
political_items.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Katya Adler: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
political_items.summary: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
political_items.summary: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
political_items.summary: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

topic_router.label: YZ Modelleri
topic_router.reason: Model savaşı, şirket içi hamleler, ürün stratejisi ve yatırım akışlarını erken okumak için çok güçlü.
